strategyResults.output: 3786/3787 in full run; single failure = pre-existing perf-budget test in untouched src/graph/preflight-injector-bench.test.ts, isolated re-run passes ~440x under budget
strategyResults.details: Load-induced flake independently verified (ps aux showed unrelated heavy background processes + vitest worker contention). Targeted sprint files 38/38 green.

criteriaResults.evidence: types.ts:46 readOnly?; schemas.ts true only on read_file(:32)/glob(:105)/grep(:127); bash/write_file/edit_file undefined (not false).
Real-timer serial floor >=135-140ms (setTimeout cannot fire early) with parallel < 70% of same-run serial — overlap physically proven; order by toolUseId preserved regardless of completion order.

Diffed executor shapes against git show 4ab7040^ old serial block — thrown-handler and unknown-tool shapes byte-identical; never-rejects test with all handlers throwing; loop completes stopReason 'end' despite mid-batch throw.

callOrder assertions; all-write batch stays serial under parallel:true; evaluator's independent runtime probe of mixed [ro,ro,write,ro] batch: maxConcurrent=2, no merge across write boundary; all pre-existing loop tests pass unmodified.

criteriaResults.description: Config flag optional, no default, threads to loop
criteriaResults.evidence: schema.ts:133 z.boolean().optional() no default; createDefaultConfig omits; generator-agent.ts:59,132 conditional spread; 4 wiring tests.

regressions.description: preflight-injector-bench perf-budget flake under machine load — NOT sprint-caused
regressions.evidence: Sprint diff never touches src/graph/; isolation run p95=0.34ms vs 100ms budget; ps aux showed unrelated load.

generatorFeedback.description: No committed test for a mixed batch with multiple read-only calls flanking a write tool; evaluator probe-verified the behavior but a regression test would protect the contiguous-run nonGoal.
generatorFeedback.expected: Add a mixed-batch concurrency/segmentation test in a later sprint.

summary: All 6 criteria independently verified incl. an evaluator-authored runtime probe of mixed-batch segmentation. Single full-suite failure proven to be unrelated machine-load flake. No nonGoal violations: bash never annotated, no hard-coded allow-list, no default-on flag. Iteration-1 pass.
